description: Verify the response health of messaging bridges.

params.cmd: ps -eo pid,etime,comm | grep -E 'slack-bridge|voice-hub|nexus-daemon' || echo 'No active services'
grep -r 'ERROR' active/shared/logs | tail -n 10 || echo 'No recent errors'

params.instruction: Based on process uptime and recent log errors, evaluate the reliability of communication bridges. Propose restarts for any 'zombie' or flapping services.
